Sal"]},{"title":"method grid","position":"lower middle","count":6,"labels":["1 SLICE POTATOES AND ONIONS","2 FRY SLOWLY IN OLIVE OIL","3 BEAT EGGS IN A BOWL","4 COMBINE FILLINGS","5 POUR INTO HOT PAN","6 FLIP WITH SKILL!"]},{"title":"bottom decorative strip","position":"bottom","count":2,"labels":["Spanish village illustration on the left","wine bottle, wine glass, olives and plate on the right"]}]},"objects":{"hero_surroundings_count":2,"hero_surroundings":["glass cruet of olive oil with olives and leaves on the right of the plate","small ceramic bowl of olive oil in front of the cruet"],"ingredient_illustrations_count":5,"ingredient_illustrations":["4 whole potatoes","2 onions with one cut open","basket of eggs with one egg outside","olive oil bottle with olives and branch","small bowl of salt with spoon and spilled salt"],"method_panels_count":6,"method_panel_details":["sliced potatoes and onion rings on a cutting board with a knife","potatoes frying in olive oil in a black pan","eggs being whisked in a patterned bowl","potato-onion mixture being poured into beaten eggs","egg mixture being poured into a hot black pan","finished tortilla being flipped with a decorative plate over a pan"]},"composition":{"ornamentation":"scroll banners, floral corner motifs, curling filigree, inked borders, engraved poster layout","background":"weathered cream parchment with subtle stains and fibers","color_palette":"golden brown, olive green, cream, faded blue, warm beige, sepia, dark ink"},"rendering_notes":"highly legible decorative typography, authentic Spanish culinary poster design, dense text integrated cleanly into the artwork, balanced infographic layout, richly textured food illustration, no modern minimalism","aspect_ratio":"2:3"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"复古插画风格西班牙食谱海报","subject":"一张放在蓝白瓷盘上的金黄色西班牙土豆饼（tortilla de patatas），切掉一块三角形以展示内部层叠的土豆","style":{"overall":"古董食谱海报，乡村地中海美食插画，陈旧羊皮纸背景，手绘线条，水彩和水粉质感，华丽的装饰花纹，温暖的深褐色印刷外观","mood":"传统，手工，怀旧，令人垂涎"},"text":{"top_brand":"{argument name=\"brand text\" default=\"Pollo AI GPT Image 2\"}","main_title_top":"Auténtica","main_title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"Tortilla de Patatas\"}","ingredients_banner":"食材","method_banner":"烹饪方法","bottom_quote":"{argument name=\"quote\" default=\"El plato más querido de España, jugoso y perfecto!\"}"},"layout":{"format":"竖版海报","sections":[{"title":"主菜","position":"上中","count":1,"labels":["完整的土豆饼，切掉一块"]},{"title":"食材行","position":"中间","count":5,"labels":["1. 4 个大土豆","2. 2 个洋葱","3. 8 个大鸡蛋","4. 特级初榨橄榄油","5. 盐"]},{"title":"方法网格","position":"中下","count":6,"labels":["1 切土豆和洋葱","2 用橄榄油慢煎","3 在碗中打散鸡蛋","4 混合馅料","5 倒入热锅","6 运用 技能 翻面！"]},{"title":"底部装饰条","position":"底部","count":2,"labels":["左侧西班牙乡村插画","右侧葡萄酒瓶、酒杯、橄榄和盘子"]}]},"objects":{"hero_surroundings_count":2,"hero_surroundings":["盘子右侧装有橄榄和叶子的橄榄油玻璃瓶","瓶前的橄榄油小瓷碗"],"ingredient_illustrations_count":5,"ingredient_illustrations":["4 个完整的土豆","2 个洋葱，其中一个切开","一篮鸡蛋，旁边放着一个鸡蛋","橄榄油瓶，配有橄榄和枝条","装有盐的小碗，配有勺子和洒出的盐"],"method_panels_count":6,"method_panel_details":["切好的土豆和洋葱圈放在案板上，旁边有一把刀","土豆在黑锅中用橄榄油煎炸","鸡蛋在花纹碗中打散","土豆洋葱混合物倒入打好的蛋液中","蛋液混合物倒入热的黑锅中","成品土豆饼用装饰盘盖在锅上进行翻面"]},"composition":{"ornamentation":"卷轴横幅，花卉边角图案，卷曲的花丝，墨线边框，雕刻海报布局","background":"风化的奶油色羊皮纸，带有细微的污渍和纤维感","color_palette":"金棕色，橄榄绿，奶油色，褪色蓝，暖米色，深褐色，深色墨水"},"rendering_notes":"高度清晰的装饰字体，地道的西班牙美食海报设计，密集的文字与艺术作品完美融合，平衡的信息图表布局，质感丰富的食物插画，拒绝现代极简主义","aspect_ratio":"2:3"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古西班牙土豆饼食谱海报：此提示词可生成一张华丽的古董风格西班牙美食海报，以土豆饼为主体，配有标注的食材和六步插画版烹饪方法，非常适合用于编辑、菜单或社交媒体。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, poster layout, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
